summary: Complete end-to-end testing of GlobalAgri Commodities redesigned corporate website. All backend APIs (16/16) and frontend features working perfectly. Successfully tested homepage hero carousel, navigation, tabbed sections, forms, and integrations.
passed_tests: Backend health check (GET /api/health - 200)
Partners API (GET /api/partners - 8 partners)
Memberships API (GET /api/memberships - 4 memberships)
Insights API with filtering (GET /api/insights - 6 articles)
Insight detail API (GET /api/insights/{id})
Jobs API (GET /api/jobs - 4 job listings)
Job detail API (GET /api/jobs/{id})
Job application submission (POST /api/jobs/apply)
Career inquiry submission (POST /api/careers/inquiry)
Contact form submission (POST /api/contact)
Contact form validation (422 for missing fields)
PDF download (GET /api/download/profile - 4412 bytes)
Homepage hero carousel with background image and 'Discover Us' CTA
Navigation to all pages (About, Commodities, Partners, Insights, Careers, Contact)
About page tabs (Who We Are, Strengths, Key Facts, Memberships)
Commodities page tabs (At A Glance, Grains & Feeds, Oilseeds, Pulses & Beans, Sugar & Rice, Coffee)
Grains & Feeds tab shows 8 product items in image grid
Partners page displays 8 partner cards from backend API
Insights page loads 6 articles with category filtering
Insight detail page loads when clicking articles
Careers page shows 4 job listings from backend
Job detail page with application form submits successfully
Career inquiry form submits successfully
Contact form submits successfully with validation
Contact page shows Google Maps embed
Company profile PDF download works (200 status)
